risk_signals.summary: Ownership chain contains: anonymous entity in ownership chain.
Ownership chain reaches into jurisdictions outside the EU/EEA: GB. AMLA CDD RTS condition (b).
Ownership chain has 3 corporate layers (AMLA threshold: ≥3).
Ownership chain reaches into Viet Nam, a jurisdiction under FATF Increased Monitoring (grey list, June 2026).
Meets AMLA CDD RTS threshold for a complex corporate structure: 3 layers of ownership combined with non-EU jurisdiction.

Advisory: structure combines opacity (unknown/anonymous parties) with complex layering. AMLA CDD RTS subjective condition — confirm whether there is a legitimate economic rationale before relying on this signal.
